title: Roasted Sweet Caramelized Malaysian Bellflower-Root-Doraji Satay
description: Sweet and herbal Malaysian-inspired satay made with roasted bellflower-root-doraji, caramelized in coconut oil and served in agave leaves.
instructions: Peel and chop the bellflower-root-doraji into thin strips.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut oil, coconut sugar, lemon juice, mint, basil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the bellflower-root-doraji to the bowl and toss until coated with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Just before roasting, thread the marinated bellflower-root-doraji onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the bellflower-root-doraji is tender and caramelized.
Meanwhile, warm the agave leaves by placing them in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
To serve, place a few pieces of the roasted bellflower-root-doraji on each agave leaf and serve immediately.
